# Current Bahamas — Master Compliance Checklist
# Version 1.0 | April 2026
# One copy per client, updated as obligations are confirmed.
# Source of truth for Compliance Items table in Airtable.

---

## Client: ___________________________  Code: ________
## Tier: T1 / T2 / T3   Island: ________________
## Checklist prepared: _______________  By: ___________

---

## SECTION 1: BUSINESS LICENCE

**Governing body:** Dept. of Inland Revenue (IRD)
**Frequency:** Annual
**Key rule:** Financial statements required if turnover above $250K.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Current licence obtained and filed | [ ] | |
| Licence expiry date documented | [ ] | |
| Licence category correct for business activity | [ ] | |
| Financial statements prepared (if turnover >$250K) | [ ] | |
| Renewal reminder set in Airtable (60 days out) | [ ] | |
| Drive copy filed | [ ] | [ClientCode]_BusinessLicence_[YYYY]_v1.pdf |

**Next renewal due:** _____________

---

## SECTION 2: VAT

**Governing body:** IRD — VAT Division
**Deadline:** 21 days after end of each VAT period
**Registration threshold:** Confirm with IRD — mark N/A if not registered.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| VAT registered? | [ ] Yes [ ] No | |
| VAT registration number in Airtable | [ ] | |
| Filing period: monthly / quarterly | [ ] | Confirm with IRD |
| All periods current (no outstanding returns) | [ ] | |
| Last VAT return: period and filed date | [ ] | Period: ________ Filed: ________ |
| Next return due date in Airtable | [ ] | |
| Any arrears or penalties outstanding | [ ] | Detail: |
| 12-month VAT calendar built in Airtable | [ ] | |

---

## SECTION 3: NIB

**Governing body:** National Insurance Board
**Deadline:** 15th of the following month
**Applies to:** All businesses with employees.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| NIB employer registration confirmed | [ ] | |
| Employer NIB number in Airtable | [ ] | |
| Current employee count confirmed | [ ] | Count: ________ |
| Last NIB payment: period and paid date | [ ] | Period: ________ Paid: ________ |
| Any arrears outstanding | [ ] | Detail: |
| Monthly reminder set in Airtable (due 15th) | [ ] | |
| Seasonal staff changes flagged | [ ] | Dates: |

---

## SECTION 4: TAX CLEARANCE CERTIFICATE (TCC)

**Governing body:** IRD / Ministry of Finance
**Required for:** Government contracts, collecting payment from government or public bodies, registering or transferring ownership of taxable goods, certain legislative allowances.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Current TCC obtained and filed | [ ] | |
| TCC expiry date in Airtable | [ ] | Expiry: ________ |
| TCC reminder set (30 days before expiry) | [ ] | |
| All preconditions current (IRD, NIB, VAT) | [ ] | |
| Any known blockers to issuance | [ ] | Detail: |
| Government-facing work anticipated | [ ] | Projects: |
| Drive copy filed | [ ] | [ClientCode]_TCC_[YYYY-MM]_v1.pdf |

**TCC readiness status:** [ ] Ready to apply  [ ] Gap-fill needed  [ ] Blocker present

---

## SECTION 5: AGRICULTURE IMPORT PERMITS

**Governing body:** Dept. of Agriculture / MyGateway
**Key rule:** Permits must be obtained BEFORE goods are purchased.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Client imports agricultural goods | [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] Confirm | If No, skip section |
| Types of goods imported documented | [ ] | |
| Permit categories required identified | [ ] | |
| Current active permits filed in Drive | [ ] | |
| Client confirmed aware of pre-purchase rule | [ ] | Date confirmed: |
| Permit lead time documented | [ ] | Typical: |
| Seasonal import calendar built | [ ] | |

---

## SECTION 6: EXEMPTIONS AND CONCESSIONS

**Programmes:** FIDEA, SERZ, EEZ, Agricultural
**Key rule:** Applications must be submitted BEFORE qualifying spend.
**Note:** CB assembles documents. Eligibility determination is a legal/tax matter — refer to attorney or accountant.

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| FIDEA eligibility assessed (Family Islands) | [ ] | |
| SERZ / EEZ eligibility assessed | [ ] | |
| Qualifying capital expenditure planned (next 12 months) | [ ] | Detail: |
| Existing exemptions documented and expiry tracked | [ ] | |
| Expiry dates in Airtable | [ ] | |
